### What this changes

A short, factual summary of the diff. Focus on behaviour change, not the
implementation walk-through.

### Why

The motivation in one or two sentences. Link issues with `Closes #123`.

### Verification

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` clean
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` clean
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] If touching the mesh: smoke-tested with `relix boot` and the
      relevant flow or endpoint
- [ ] If touching docs: links resolve, examples actually run

### Notes for reviewers

Anything subtle, anything you're unsure about, anything you punted on.

---

#### Authorship rule

This project does not accept commits authored by, or co-authored by,
AI assistants. Use `git commit` with your own name + email; do not
add `Co-authored-by:` trailers for AI tools, and do not include
attribution lines like "Generated by ..." in commit messages, code
comments, or PR descriptions. Tools that help you write code are
fine; the commit byline must be yours.
